chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1781 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.8821/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. 03.03.2025 Mr. Hamza Waheed, advocate and Mr. Sami-ur-Rehman, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel, this petition assails a notice, which is unwarranted in view of the judgment reported as 2021 PTD 885. Be that as it may, learned counsel states that the petitioner shall contest the notice before the issuing authority, however, seeks that the same be adjudicated vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid, no coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned Assistant Attorney General articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
